name: implicit-keep-after-undo
description: Regression: when the user is sitting at a popped-back state (undoPendingState set) and replies with an implicit-keep phrasing like 'I already told you' / 'use what I gave you', it must classify as 'keep' (advance with stored value) — NOT fall through to side-channel as 'question' which leaves the bot saying 'noted, I'll come back to that' and the user stuck.

turns.user: I already told you, use what I gave

reply_not_contains: Noted, I'll come back to that
